title: John Gray
content:
People.ContactEmail jgray@mccarthy.ca
- University of Toronto
John Gray is an associate in our Labour & Employment group in Toronto. His practice focuses on providing advice and representation to employers in all areas of workplace law.
Prior to joining the firm, John summered and articled at a full-service firm.
John is passionate about community and advocacy. While in law school, John was an active member of student government and competed in the Baby Gale Moot and Bowman National Tax Moot. He was also the recipient of the course prize in the Law & Economics Seminar.
Prior to pursuing law school, he attended the University of British Columbia and graduated with a Bachelor of Commerce with Honours. He was also awarded the Dan Muzyka Head of Class Award. John later earned his law degree from the University of Toronto and was called to the Bar in 2024. John is a member of the Law Society of Ontario.
